summary: Backend-only E2E pytest suite for Corn Club: 26/26 tests passed. Covered health, auth (register/login/me/duplicate/wrong-password/protected-routes), onboarding, balances, transactions CRUD, goals CRUD + projection (both no-savings and positive-savings paths), holdings (Alpha Vantage enrichment fields present), AI chat (Claude Haiku 4.5), AI chat history, AI suggest-investments (3 items with ticker/name/reason). No critical or minor backend issues found.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 on resource creation. Functional but not REST-idiomatic.
Pydantic EmailStr rejects malformed emails with 422 (not 401). Behaviorally fine but worth knowing for client-side error mapping.
CORS is allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True - browsers ignore credentials with wildcard. Not a security issue for token-in-header auth but inconsistent.

action_items: No backend fixes required. Frontend testing was explicitly skipped per request.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 547 lines and approaching the 700-line split threshold; consider splitting into routers (auth, transactions, goals, holdings, ai) when feature work continues.
build_user_context indexes t['date'][:7] which assumes ISO format; safe today because we always write isoformat(), but a defensive parse would be more robust.
_price_cache is in-memory per-worker; with multiple uvicorn workers the Alpha Vantage 25/day quota will be hit faster. Acceptable for MVP.
seed_data_creation: Each test run registers a fresh TEST_corn_<uuid>@corn.club user; all created transactions/goals/holdings are prefixed with TEST_ and most are deleted in their own test class. A small amount of TEST_ chat history and a couple of TEST_ transactions remain on the throwaway user (no cleanup needed since the user itself is throwaway).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Test user test@corn.club/password123 exists but is NOT onboarded - use it only for login flow tests; create a fresh user (uuid email) for any state-modifying suite. Alpha Vantage rate limit is 25/day shared - tests assert presence of current_price field but tolerate null. AI tests hit real Claude Haiku 4.5 (Emergent key) so each run consumes quota; chat history will accumulate on the throwaway user.
